description: W1 real pilot-scope golden question set for joblogic-kb/api-docs. 10 queries against 9 real markdown documents from ai-agentopia/docs repo. Source-level relevance grading.

grading_scale.0: irrelevant — chunk has no useful information for the query
grading_scale.1: partially relevant — chunk contains related but incomplete information
grading_scale.2: fully relevant — chunk directly answers or substantially addresses the query

pilot_corpus: 9 documents from ai-agentopia/docs repo. ui-knowledge-workflow-trigger.md excluded — not in docs repo (ingested directly, not from canonical source).
label_strategy: source-level: relevance grade assigned per source document. All chunks from a grade-2 source receive grade 2; grade-1 source → grade 1; unlabeled sources → grade 0.
labeling_status: REVIEWED — labels verified against document heading structure. Each query-source mapping confirmed by checking the document's heading/section that answers the query. Awaiting CTO sign-off for authoritative status.
metric_model: nDCG@5 and MRR are authoritative. Precision@5 is directional. Recall@5 is NOT reported (source-level grading makes it invalid — denominator is source count, numerator is chunk count).
wave: W1 real pilot — 10 queries against joblogic-kb/api-docs (9 docs)

samples.query: What are the core services in the Agentopia platform architecture?

relevant_sources.reason: H3 Core Services — directly lists and describes all 7 services (Bot Config API, Gateway, Memory, LLM Proxy, Vector DB, Graph DB, Vault)
H2 System Architecture — contains service diagram but less detail than chatbot-architecture

samples.query: How does bot provisioning work and how are credentials secured?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 Bot Provisioning (5-step pipeline) + H3 Token Security (K8s secrets, not Git)

samples.query: What is the memory architecture and how does scope-based isolation work?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 Memory Architecture (3-layer: identity/knowledge/session) + H3 Scope-Based Isolation
Multi-bot memory design with layer details — related but not primary answer

samples.query: How does the governed PR review workflow operate end-to-end?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 How It Works (6-step process) + H2 Architecture Summary (two-plane separation)

samples.query: What is the dual-lane interaction model and what are the execution boundaries?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 Dual-Lane Interaction Model (communication vs workflow) + H2 Execution Boundaries (3 boundaries)

samples.query: How do agents communicate using the A2A thread model?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 How Agents Communicate + H2 Thread Model (state machine, epochs) + H2 Turn Protocol

samples.query: What is the SA Knowledge Base and how does it inject context at inference time?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 SA Knowledge Base — gateway plugin, scope resolution, XML injection, citation contract
D3 Outcome (ADR-010) describes runtime retrieval architecture — detailed but not the concise answer

samples.query: What are the production acceptance criteria for the SA Knowledge Base?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 Section 10: Production Acceptance Criteria — lists 8 criteria

samples.query: What human-in-the-loop controls exist in the A2A collaboration system?
What is the reviewer bot's scope of permissions and what can it not do?

relevant_sources.reason: H2 Reviewer Bot (scoped permissions: read repo, submit review, cannot approve/merge) + H2 What This Is Not (4 explicit limitations)
